def positive_oserror_caught_without_errno_inspection():
    rule_id = "oserror_caught_without_errno_inspection"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "OSError caught as a broad class without inspecting errno to distinguish ENOENT, EACCES, and others."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
